summary: Block 248 (Instant-On Prompt), Block 250 (Duplicate Detector), Block 252 (Week in Wax Migration). All 11 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend verified: Duplicates button works with modal, Week in Wax on ProfilePage (not CollectionPage), Daily Prompt Card visible. FIXED: Double /api prefix bug in CollectionPage.js duplicate API calls.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Double /api prefix in duplicate API calls causing 'Could not check for duplicates' error

critical_code_review_comments: collection.py lines 158-213: GET /api/records/duplicates correctly returns duplicate_groups with discogs_id, count, records, needs_review
collection.py lines 188-213: DELETE /api/records/duplicates/clean correctly removes dupes keeping oldest, skips groups with different notes
daily_prompts.py lines 122-136: _extract_dominant_color extracts color from thumbnail and stores in image_cache
daily_prompts.py lines 418-435: Prompt responses include dominant_color, blur_data_url, thumb_url from image_cache
DailyPrompt.js lines 127-133: prompt-album-art-container has GPU acceleration CSS (translateZ, willChange) and dominant_color background
ProfilePage.js lines 694-726: 'Your Week in Wax' section appears below bio for own profile with records
CollectionPage.js: Week in Wax CTA correctly REMOVED from collection tab

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified after bug fix)

seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up duplicate records with discogs_id 99999888 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 248/250/252 fully verified. Fixed bug in CollectionPage.js where duplicate API calls had double /api prefix (${API}/api/records/duplicates instead of ${API}/records/duplicates). Backend endpoints work correctly. Duplicate detector shows 'No Duplicates Found' for clean collections. Week in Wax on ProfilePage shows Added/Spins/Total stats with link to Wax Report. Daily Prompt album art container has dominant_color + GPU acceleration CSS but user must buzz in to see carousel.

backend_duplicates_endpoint.details: GET /api/records/duplicates returns {duplicate_groups: [], total_duplicates: 0} for clean collection

backend_prompt_dominant_color.details: GET /api/prompts/{id}/responses includes dominant_color field from image_cache

frontend_duplicate_modal.details: Clicking button opens modal (data-testid='duplicate-modal') showing 'No Duplicates Found'

frontend_no_duplicates_state.details: 'No Duplicates Found' state with sparkle icon and 'Your collection is already clean!' message

frontend_week_in_wax_profile.details: 'Your Week in Wax' section on ProfilePage (data-testid='profile-week-in-wax') with Added/Spins/Total

frontend_week_in_wax_removed_collection.details: Week in Wax CTA is NOT present in CollectionPage (correctly removed)

frontend_daily_prompt_card.details: Daily Prompt Card visible (data-testid='daily-prompt-card') with buzz count and 'buzz in' button

frontend_prompt_album_art_container.details: prompt-album-art-container has dominant_color background + GPU acceleration CSS (translateZ, willChange)

bug_fix_applied.issue: API paths had double /api prefix (${API}/api/records/duplicates instead of ${API}/records/duplicates)
bug_fix_applied.resolution: Removed extra /api prefix from axios calls for handleCheckDuplicates and handleCleanDuplicates
bug_fix_applied.rca: The API variable from AuthContext already includes /api suffix. The CollectionPage component was incorrectly adding another /api prefix, resulting in 404 errors.

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked for this test
